study_title: Subnational Spatial Distribution and Ensemble ML Predictors of Neonatal and Under-Five Mortality Across Ghana's 261 Health Districts
primary_outcome: Under-five mortality rate (U5MR) and neonatal mortality rate (NMR) per 1,000 live births
primary_result: U5MR range 20–72/1000 LB; Moran's I=0.7783 (z=19.322, p<0.001); 72 high-risk districts (27.6%); top predictor: early breastfeeding initiation (Gini=0.224)
top_finding_1: Significant spatial clustering confirmed (Global Moran's I=0.7783, z=19.322, p<0.001, KNN-4); 16 HH and 30 LL LISA clusters
top_finding_2: Stacked ensemble (RF+GB) CV AUC=1.00 (ecological artifact); Gini top-3: early breastfeeding (0.224), diarrhoea (0.182), full vaccination (0.136)
target_journal: BMC Public Health / IJID (Ghana APC waiver verified)
